TEST CASE: requirements...
OBJECTIVE: Verify requirement compliance
STEPS:
1. Setup test environment
2. Execute requirement validation
3. Verify expected outcomes

=== COMPLIANCE ENHANCEMENT REQUIRED ===

ADDITIONAL COMPLIANCE STEPS:

VALIDATION: Confirm all actions are logged with timestamps, user IDs, and operation details

7. Verify all regulatory requirements are addressed

EXPECTED: Requirement satisfied
COMPLIANCE EXPECTED: All missing regulatory elements addressed

compliance_validation.regulatory_section: Acceptance / UAT Test Cases: Ensure customer-facing requirements deliver intended
